title: Captain Yossarian
content:
{{Top|rwp|sortkey=*Captain Yossarian}}
{{Otheruses|Ben}}
'''Benjamin Christopher Norton Dawe''' wrote the backstories for [[Kalyn Farnmir/Legends|Kalyn Farnmir]], [[Myhr Rho]], [[Willrow Hood/Legends|Willrow Hood]] and [[Seib Nod]] as well as contributing the name and other elements to the story of [[Romeo Treblanc]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace: The Official ''Star Wars'' Fan Club]]. He was also a [[StarWars.com Message Boards]] forum moderator on [[StarWars.com]] under the alias ''Captain Yossarian''.

{{Author-stub}}
